penalties.description: Task appears to be a demonstration or training video showing intracorporeal knot tying steps rather than a timed performance attempt. No completion observed.

consensus_score.reasoning: Fundamental disagreement on task completion status. Claude identified this as an instructional demonstration without timing structure, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed performance. Given the lack of clear start/end timing markers and the instructional nature described by Claude, this appears to be a demonstration video rather than a scoreable FLS performance attempt.

disagreements.rationale: Without clear timing markers or completion criteria visible, cannot establish valid completion time for FLS scoring

claude_value.description: Task appears to be a demonstration or training video showing intracorporeal knot tying steps rather than a timed performance attempt. No completion observed.

gpt_value.description: A required hand exchange between throws was clearly missed.
The knot slipped slightly under tension.

disagreements.rationale: If the video is instructional rather than a performance attempt, technique penalties are not applicable under FLS scoring rules
Incomplete task results in zero score regardless of observed technique elements
If task was not completed as a performance attempt, only demonstrated phases should be counted
